name: Master Flank Steak Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon liquid from canned chipotles en adobo
2 teaspoons Chinese black beans with garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium saucepan.
2. Add onion and saute until soft and pale red.
3. Add minced garlic and ginger and saute for 5 minutes.
4. Add soy sauce, lime juice, orange juice, and zest, sugar, mustard, chipotle, black beans, and five-spice powder.
5. Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
7. Stir in cilantro, salt, and pepper.
Pour into a glass jar with a tight-fitting lid. Will keep up to 2 weeks in the refrigerator. Yields 2 cups.
